creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update devel/pccts port.


diff -Nru pccts/files/md5 pccts-1.33.22/files/md5
--- pccts/files/md5	Tue Mar 21 14:11:58 2000
+++ pccts-1.33.22/files/md5	Wed Mar 29 09:48:50 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pccts133mr.zip) = 24ac585a0fa4954ef87a6d24a1abc841
+MD5 (pccts133mr.zip) = 0a2bc7aa6b34e23e879bf575c79737bd
diff -Nru pccts/pkg/DESCR pccts-1.33.22/pkg/DESCR
--- pccts/pkg/DESCR	Mon Jul  5 14:24:32 1999
+++ pccts-1.33.22/pkg/DESCR	Wed Mar 29 09:53:22 2000
@@ -12,4 +12,4 @@
 make it easier to use for a wider range of translation
 problems.
 
-WWW: http://www.polhode.com/
+WWW: http://www.polhode.com/pccts.html

Fix: 

Please, check and apply this patch.
